{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-45056", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:H/UI:N/VC:N/VI:H/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-290", "name": "Authentication Bypass by Spoofing"}], "description": "### Impact

The `matrix-sdk-crypto` crate before 0.16.1 is missing a check for the sender's user ID when decrypting an Olm-encrypted to-device message containing the `sender_device_keys` property.

This could be exploited to spoof the sender of an encrypted to-device message, but only if the attacker colludes with (or is) the homeserver operator.

### Patches

This issue is fixed in `matrix-sdk-crypto` 0.16.1.

### Workarounds

There are no known workarounds for the issue.

### References

This issue was fixed in https://github.com/matrix-org/matrix-rust-sdk/pull/6553.

### For more information

If you have any questions or comments about this advisory, please email us at [security at matrix.org](mailto:security@matrix.org).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0005, "percentile": 0.1618}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-wfq4-36m3-9g42", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-04T14:47:05Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wfq4-36m3-9g42", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-wfq4-36m3-9g42"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45056"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-04T14:47:05Z", "references": ["https://github.com/matrix-org/matrix-rust-sdk/security/advisories/GHSA-wfq4-36m3-9g42", "https://github.com/matrix-org/matrix-rust-sdk/pull/6553", "https://github.com/matrix-org/matrix-rust-sdk/releases/tag/matrix-sdk-0.16.1", "https://rustsec.org/advisories/RUSTSEC-2026-0159.html", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wfq4-36m3-9g42"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/matrix-org/matrix-rust-sdk/security-advisories/GHSA-wfq4-36m3-9g42", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/matrix-org/matrix-rust-sdk", "summary": "Matrix Rust SDK: Sender-binding gaps in to-device and room-key attribution", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-04T14:47:05Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-wfq4-36m3-9g42", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.16.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "matrix-sdk-crypto"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.12.0, < 0.16.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Matrix Rust SDK: Sender-binding gaps in to-device and room-key attribution
